# Subsidence Analysis

**Summary**: A method to calculate past subsidence rates by removing the effects of sediment loading and compaction.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] used backstripping to quantify the multi-phase subsidence history from Cretaceous to recent periods.

## Key Results and Findings

- The first rift cycle showed a high initial subsidence rate of 126.58 m/Ma. ([[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017, p. 144]])
